title: cracca dolichocarpa
intro: Cracca dolichocarpa, also known as the long-fruited broom, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca dolichocarpa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cracca dolichocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
